description: Style Note Crafted from leather, this fossil belt has a refined finish complemented by its smart gunmetal buckle. Fossil leather breathes, regulates temperature to suit the climate, prevents dust penetration and has high ripping resistance that makes it a must-have in your wardrobe! Product Details Black reversible belt, with brown on the other side, made of leather and has stitched detailing Tang clasp with a fixed loop to offer a snug Fit and to hold the belt in place Holes to customise fit Material and Care Leather Use a brass polish to maintain buckle shine Use a branded leather conditioner to protect the belt Size Length: 42"
